name: Pricing Table
description: Comparison pricing cards with features list, pricing tiers, and CTA buttons.

default.description: Comparison pricing cards with features list, pricing tiers, and CTA buttons.

slots.pricing-card: Card per tier with price, name, and highlighted Badge
slots.features-list: Checklist of included features separated by Separator
slots.cta: Primary action Button per pricing tier

feature-comparison.description: Feature comparison grid with check/x indicators per plan. Used for spec comparisons, plan feature matrices, and product comparison tables.

slots.header-row: Plan name columns with optional highlight Badge
slots.feature-row: Feature name + check/x per plan column
slots.category: Optional feature category grouping with Separator
